hooks.command: echo 'test-manim skill available. Invoke: /test-manim "topic" [--duration 30|60|90|120] [--model name]. Phases: scaffold → SCENE_PLAN.md → scene files → render.sh → merge.sh → report. ManimGL only: from manimlib import *, ShowCreation, TexText, Tex. See skills/test-manim/SKILL.md for full instructions.'
